llm_score_rationale: The research overstates support and omits controlling authority for the objective. Claims c001 and c003 rely on LII Wex/UCC excerpts about warranties and misrepresentation (e.g., UCC §2-313, warranty and misrepresentation definitions) that do not address corporate liability for vendor-caused data breaches, jurisdictional duties, foreseeability/proximate cause, indemnities, or standing. Claim c002 is unsubstantiated (no sources, zero confidence). Material controlling authorities (statutes, bindin
